description: Urgent re-review queue for the curmudgeon. Items here jump ALL normal cycle work (Phase 1, Phase 2, Phase 3). Default: one item per curmudgeon run — guaranteed fresh context, no batch contamination. As of 2026-04-25, curmudgeon may batch up to 3 items in a single run if all qualifying items are minor re-reviews (decider classified all triggering patches severity:minor, no verdict change, combined patch diff <10KB, target reviewed within last 3 cycles, not a fresh onboard) — see curmudgeon.md Step 8a. Throughput is managed by mode flag + decider scheduler mutation.

mode_rules.bau: Curmudgeon runs on normal 4h schedule. Priority queue is still honored — curmudgeon pops one item per run, but items drain at the normal cadence.
mode_rules.churn-and-burn: Decider, at end of every run, checks queue depth. If queue.length > 0, decider bumps curmudgeon schedule to every 30 min via update_scheduled_task. When queue empties, decider restores curmudgeon to every 4h AND auto-flips mode back to 'bau' (so a forgotten churn-and-burn can't leave curmudgeon pinned fast).

queue.reason: EXP-407 integrated: footnote (i) penumbra scaling analysis upgraded from hand-wave to exact two-reading derivation. Curmudgeon should verify math and strengthened conclusion.

SEC-6.14 c5 H1-H5 patched: (H1) "unpublished" reframed to reference W004 baseline; (H2) defender example upgraded to ensemble upper bound; (H3) "inversely" removed; (H4) station type clarified; (H5) sentence split. Verification: confirm patches landed cleanly and argument flow holds.

H1/H2/H3 moderate patches applied by decider-2026-05-17T05-20Z: (H1) particle horizon→Hubble horizon; (H2) WIN-053 magnetic-cap boundary→co-opted scale-length with λ=8,619km; (H3) sector-decomposition escape closed. Verify patches landed correctly and verdict still holds.

context_hints.patch_summary: H1: terminology fix; H2: citation accuracy fix; H3: forced-dichotomy escape closed

schedule_state.note: Reconciled stale April 17 churn-and-burn values — actual cron cadence has been 4h for curmudgeon/analyst/decider since burndown deploy. Decider Step E4 was flagging schedule_action_needed=restore_to_bau because it read these stale 30m values; the cron schedules themselves were already correct.
